en.name: Ashura Doji
en.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Land of Wano} type and your opponent has 3 or more Life cards, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 5 or less.

jp.name: アシュラ童子
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のリーダーが特徴《ワノ国》を持ち、相手のライフが3枚以上の場合、相手の元々のコスト5以下のキャラ1枚までを、KOする。

definition.name: Ashura Doji
definition.text: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Land of Wano} type and your opponent has 3 or more Life cards, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 5 or less.

en.name: Izo
en.effectText: [DON!! x2] This Character gains [Blocker].[On Play] Your {Land of Wano} type Leader gains [Banish] during this turn.

jp.name: イゾウ
jp.effectText: 【ドン‼×2】このキャラは【ブロッカー】を得る。【登場時】自分の特徴《ワノ国》を持つリーダーは、このターン中、【バニッシュ】を得る。

definition.name: Izo
definition.text: [DON!! x2] This Character gains [Blocker].[On Play] Your {Land of Wano} type Leader gains [Banish] during this turn.

en.name: Kin'emon
en.effectText: [Trigger] If your Leader has the {Land of Wano} type and your opponent has 3 or less Life cards, play this card.

jp.name: 錦えもん
jp.effectText: 【トリガー】自分のリーダーが特徴《ワノ国》を持ち、相手のライフが3枚以下の場合、このカードを登場させる。

definition.name: Kin'emon
definition.text: [Trigger] If your Leader has the {Land of Wano} type and your opponent has 3 or less Life cards, play this card.

en.name: Kouzuki Momonosuke
en.effectText: [Your Turn] If you have 2 or less Life cards, your Leader gains +1000 power.[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may return 2 total of your currently given DON!! cards to your cost area rested: This Character gains [Rush] and +1000 power during this turn.(This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)

jp.name: 光月モモの助
jp.effectText: 【自分のターン中】自分のライフが2枚以下の場合、自分のリーダーのパワー+1000。【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分の付与されているドン‼合計2枚をコストエリアにレストで戻すことができる：このキャラは、このターン中、【速攻】を得て、パワー+1000。(このカードは登場したターンにアタックできる)

definition.name: Kouzuki Momonosuke
definition.text: [Your Turn] If you have 2 or less Life cards, your Leader gains +1000 power.[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may return 2 total of your currently given DON!! cards to your cost area rested: This Character gains [Rush] and +1000 power during this turn.(This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)

en.name: Yamato
en.effectText: [DON!! x2] [Your Turn] This Character gains +3000 power.[On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Land of Wano} type card with a cost of 2 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

jp.name: ヤマト
jp.effectText: 【ドン‼×2】【自分のターン中】このキャラのパワー+3000。【登場時】自分のデッキの上から5枚を見て、コスト2以上の特徴《ワノ国》を持つカード1枚までを公開し、手札に加える。その後、残りを好きな順番でデッキの下に置く。

definition.name: Yamato
definition.text: [DON!! x2] [Your Turn] This Character gains +3000 power.[On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Land of Wano} type card with a cost of 2 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
